title: pilosella neohybrida
intro: Pilosella neohybrida, also known as a hybrid of Pilosella aurantiaca and Pilosella officiarum, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella neohybrida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Pilosella neohybrida can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
